text.title: Cloud Run Jobs Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the cloud-run-jobs methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: Workload spec, idempotency review, image tag
step.action: Confirm workload is run-to-completion + tasks are idempotent.
step.output: Decision: proceed with Cloud Run Job OR pivot.
step.decision-gate: If non-idempotent and cannot be made idempotent → STOP and route to a workflow that owns retry policy.

step.name: wire-up
step.action: Create job; if scheduled, create dedicated SA + Cloud Scheduler with `roles/run.invoker`.

step.name: smoke-execute
step.action: Trigger one execution; verify all tasks complete; inspect logs.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `validate-cloud-run-jobs.py`; reject placeholder tokens and secrets.
